CookieBanner.title: Cookies and analytics
CookieBanner.description: We use strictly necessary cookies and, if you accept, measurement tools to improve the experience. You may reject non-essential cookies.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Institutional form for commercial alliances, technology, Paraguay corporate structuring and group enquiries.
ContactPage.title: Let’s discuss your next move
ContactPage.subtitle: Business-oriented responses. Share your intent and a concise project summary; our team reviews each request strategically.
ContactPage.sla: Target first response: 2 business days (subject to volume and complexity).

errors.company: Please enter your company or organization.

EnterpriseDisclaimer.title: Legal notice
EnterpriseDisclaimer.body: Information on corporate and tax structuring is general and informational only and does not constitute legal, tax or accounting advice. Each matter should be reviewed by qualified professionals in Paraguay and other relevant jurisdictions.

Partners.title: Trust and relationships
Partners.subtitle: We work with partners and corporate clients under strong compliance standards. Published logos are used with explicit authorization.

LanyChat.welcome: Hi! I am Lany. I can guide you on Import & Export, Developer, or Enterprise Solution.
